title: Nojiko and Genzo Risk Everything
description: On pages 5–8, nojiko and genzo risk everything focuses on Sanji, Nojiko, Genzo, Luffy as the fight centers on freeing Luffy from underwater before Arlong’s crew can finish the Straw Hats.
scene: On pages 5–8, nojiko and genzo risk everything focuses on Sanji, Nojiko, Genzo, Luffy as the fight centers on freeing Luffy from underwater before Arlong’s crew can finish the Straw Hats.

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: Ahh! That octopus is back up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Damn it! I thought that rubber band might have hit me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hah! Exactly what I was aiming for!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I won't let you bastards have your way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll kill your friend that just went into the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no reason to look so Frus- Trated because either way...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Leave the rest to me, Nami's sister!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Get away from that rock! I'll crush it with my kick!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I just have to destroy this rock...!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
